sections.heading: This Act may cited as the Appropriation Act, Short title

(I) On th� authority of the warrant issued by the President, Appropria�
tion
there may be e�r,;inded from the general revenues of the Republic,
moneys not exceeding in the aggregate two thousand two hundred
and twenty-seven billion, seven hundred and twenty-two million,
five hundre,d and sixty-five thousand and ninety-nine kwacha as
may be required for the services of the Republic during the
financial year ending on the 31st December, 1999.
(2) The moneys referred to in subsection (I) shall be appropri­
ated to the services oftheRepublic specified in the Second Column
of the Schedule in amounts not exceeding the amounts indicated in
the Third Column of the Schedule.
(3) On the written authority of the Secretary to the Treasurery,
Ministry of Finance and Economic Development, the amounts
shown under the sub-heads of estimates may be varied:
Provi::I,,d that-
(a ) the amounts appropriated to each Head shall not
thereby be altered; and
(bi the amounts shown under Head 20/01 or21 /0l shall not
be varied.
Single copies ofrhis Act may be obtainedf rom the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price KJ,000 each.
